top_signals.title: US Natural Gas Drops in Thin Trading as Options Contracts Expire
top_signals.summary: US natural gas futures fell just before options contracts for front-month delivery expired, erasing earlier gains that had been triggered by an increase in domestic gas supplies flowing to liquefied natural gas export terminals on the Gulf Coast. Losses were likely aided by a cool shift in weather forecasts, signaling lower demand for gas-fired power to run air-conditioning.

top_signals.title: Charter confirms data breach after ShinyHunters extortion threat
top_signals.summary: U.S. telecommunications giant Charter Communications has confirmed it suffered a data breach after the ShinyHunters extortion group threatened to leak stolen data unless a ransom is paid. [...]
